one_liner: Apify is a self-serve web scraping/automation platform with a broad REST API secured by personal API tokens, plus an official hosted MCP server exposing Actors as agent tools.

auth_methods.notes: Personal API token generated in Apify Console (Integrations page), sent as Authorization: Bearer <token> (recommended) or as a token URL query parameter.
Supported for third-party integrations and used by the hosted MCP server (mcp.apify.com) as an alternative to API token.
Agentic payment protocols (x402 PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header, Skyfire skyfire-pay-id header) allow AI agents to authenticate/pay for Actor runs without a full Apify account.

self_serve_notes: Permanent free tier with no credit card required, includes $5/month platform credits; API tokens are self-generated instantly in the Console. Paid plans start at $29/month for higher limits.

api_surface.notes: Full REST API (OpenAPI spec available) covering Actors, runs, datasets, key-value stores, storage, webhooks, etc. Official JS and Python SDK clients wrap the REST endpoints. Thousands of Actors available in the Store act as pre-built scraping/automation tools.

evidence.supports: Describes REST API, authentication via API token (Bearer header or token query param), and agentic payment support.
Details API token generation, authentication methods, token expiration and rotation, confirming self-serve API access.
Confirms free tier with $5 monthly credits, no credit card required, and paid plans starting at $29/month.
Official hosted MCP server exposing Apify Actors as tools for AI agents, supporting OAuth or API token auth.
